summary: Personal Intelligence Bug Fix VERIFIED - Backend and Frontend fully tested. The bug where Personal Intelligence fields couldn't be edited/saved is now FIXED. All 8 backend API tests pass. Frontend Edit/Save/Cancel flow works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: PersonalIntelSection.tsx: Clean component with proper state management (useState for details, editing, form, saving)
PersonalIntelSection.tsx lines 131-140: API call correctly fetches personal details on mount using useEffect/useCallback
PersonalIntelSection.tsx line 158: PATCH call correctly sends { personal_details: payload } format
PersonalIntelSection.tsx lines 144-152: startEdit/cancelEdit properly manage form state - Cancel discards changes
PersonalIntelSection.tsx lines 105-119: buildViewItems correctly formats data for display with labels and icons
contacts.py lines 562-582: PATCH endpoint correctly merges new data with existing and filters empty values
contacts.py lines 543-559: GET endpoint correctly returns personal_details with has_details boolean
Component has proper data-testid attributes for testing: personal-intel-section, edit-intel-btn, save-intel-btn, cancel-edit-intel-btn, add-personal-intel-btn
seed_data_creation: Used existing contact with personal_details. Test data was created/updated during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Personal Intelligence editing feature is working. Contact 69a8abe36a8712d026633756 has test data with spouse_name, kids, interests, occupation, employer, vehicle details, pets, neighborhood, etc. The PersonalIntelSection component is at /app/frontend/components/PersonalIntelSection.tsx and is imported into /app/frontend/app/contact/[id].tsx. Backend endpoints at /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/personal-details (GET/PATCH) both work correctly.

features_verified.backend_get_personal_details: PASS - Returns personal_details, vehicle, has_details fields
features_verified.backend_patch_merges_data: PASS - New data merges with existing data
features_verified.backend_patch_filters_empty: PASS - Empty strings/nulls are filtered out
features_verified.backend_patch_persistence: PASS - Data persists after PATCH (verified with GET)
features_verified.backend_all_fields: PASS - All 16 personal details fields can be saved and retrieved
features_verified.frontend_details_tab_shows_personal_inte: PASS - Personal Intelligence section visible in Details tab
features_verified.frontend_view_mode_displays_data: PASS - Shows spouse, kids, interests, work, vehicle, pets, area, etc.
features_verified.frontend_edit_button_visible: PASS - Edit button present in view mode
features_verified.frontend_edit_mode_form: PASS - Click Edit shows all field inputs with existing values populated
features_verified.frontend_save_button_works: PASS - Click Save calls PATCH API and updates display
features_verified.frontend_cancel_button_works: PASS - Click Cancel discards changes and returns to view mode
features_verified.frontend_success_toast: PASS - Toast message 'Personal details saved!' shown after save
features_verified.frontend_add_personal_intel_button: VERIFIED in code - Shows dashed button when no data exists
